message:
feat(fcp-e2e): expand end-to-end testing infrastructure and logging

E2E test harness improvements:

lib.rs (+416 lines):
- Test fixture management: setup, teardown, resource cleanup
- Connector lifecycle testing: enrollment→healthy→shutdown sequences
- Multi-connector scenarios: parallel connectors, resource contention
- Failure injection: network partitions, timeout simulation, error paths
- Snapshot testing: golden file comparison for protocol conformance
- Property-based tests: arbitrary capability sets, random state transitions
- Benchmark harness: throughput, latency percentiles, memory tracking
- CI integration: JUnit XML output, coverage collection hooks

logging.rs (+270 lines):
- Structured logging setup: JSON formatting for test output
- Log capture: per-test log collection, assertion on log contents
- Log level filtering: per-module verbosity, trace-level debugging
- Span context: distributed tracing correlation IDs
- Log rotation: size-based, time-based for long-running tests
- Sensitive data filtering: secret redaction, PII masking
- Performance logging: operation timing, slow query detection
- Error context enrichment: automatic backtrace attachment

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
